mapper.select: SELECT t.id AS trip_id, #{userId} AS user_id, t.status AS trip_status, m.status AS member_status, t.owner_user_id AS owner_user_id FROM trip.trips t LEFT JOIN trip.trip_members m ON m.trip_id = t.id AND m.user_id = #{userId} WHERE t.id = #{tripId}

SELECT t.id, t.owner_user_id, t.title, t.display_destination, t.status, t.itinerary_version, (SELECT MIN(d.date) FROM itinerary.itinerary_days d WHERE d.trip_id = t.id AND d.group_type = 'DAY') AS start_date, (SELECT MAX(d.date) FROM itinerary.itinerary_days d WHERE d.trip_id = t.id AND d.group_type = 'DAY') AS end_date, t.retripped_from_post_id, t.retripped_from_snapshot_version, t.created_at, t.updated_at, t.deleted_at FROM trip.trips t WHERE t.id = #{tripId}

SELECT t.id, t.owner_user_id, t.title, t.display_destination, t.status, t.itinerary_version, (SELECT MIN(d.date) FROM itinerary.itinerary_days d WHERE d.trip_id = t.id AND d.group_type = 'DAY') AS start_date, (SELECT MAX(d.date) FROM itinerary.itinerary_days d WHERE d.trip_id = t.id AND d.group_type = 'DAY') AS end_date, t.retripped_from_post_id, t.retripped_from_snapshot_version, t.created_at, t.updated_at, t.deleted_at
ORDER BY t.created_at DESC, t.id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.sql:
FROM trip.trips t JOIN trip.trip_members m ON m.trip_id = t.id AND m.user_id = #{userId} AND m.status = 'ACTIVE' WHERE t.status != 'DELETED'
AND ( LOWER(t.title) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%')) OR LOWER(COALESCE(t.display_destination, '')) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%')) )
mapper.select:
SELECT t.id, t.owner_user_id, t.title, t.display_destination, t.status, t.itinerary_version, (SELECT MIN(d.date) FROM itinerary.itinerary_days d WHERE d.trip_id = t.id AND d.group_type = 'DAY') AS start_date, (SELECT MAX(d.date) FROM itinerary.itinerary_days d WHERE d.trip_id = t.id AND d.group_type = 'DAY') AS end_date, t.retripped_from_post_id, t.retripped_from_snapshot_version, t.created_at, t.updated_at, t.deleted_at
ORDER BY t.created_at DESC, t.id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT i.id, i.trip_id, i.invite_code, i.invitee_user_id, i.status, i.expires_at, t.owner_user_id, t.status AS trip_status FROM trip.trip_invites i JOIN trip.trips t ON t.id = i.trip_id WHERE i.invite_code = #{inviteCode} ORDER BY i.created_at DESC, i.id DESC LIMIT 1

WITH candidates AS ( SELECT CAST(t.id AS text) AS id, t.title, t.display_destination AS displayDestination, COALESCE( (SELECT MIN(d.date) FROM itinerary.itinerary_days d WHERE d.trip_id = t.id AND d.date >= CURRENT_DATE), (SELECT MAX(d.date) FROM itinerary.itinerary_days d WHERE d.trip_id = t.id AND d.date < CURRENT_DATE) ) AS startDate, (SELECT count(*) FROM trip.trip_members m2 WHERE m2.trip_id = t.id AND m2.status = 'ACTIVE') AS memberCount, NULL AS coverImageUrl, t.created_at AS created_at FROM trip.trips t JOIN trip.trip_members m ON m.trip_id = t.id AND m.user_id = CAST(#{userId} AS uuid) AND m.status = 'ACTIVE' WHERE t.status = 'ACTIVE' ) SELECT id, title, displayDestination, startDate, memberCount, coverImageUrl FROM candidates ORDER BY (startDate IS NOT NULL AND startDate >= CURRENT_DATE) DESC, startDate ASC NULLS LAST, created_at DESC LIMIT 1
